news.title: Olson hits 2 homers, Harris and Albies also go deep as Braves roll to 5-3 win over struggling Mets
news.summary: Matt Olson hit two home runs, Michael Harris II added a two-run shot, and Ozzie Albies also homered as the Atlanta Braves cranked up their power game to beat the New York Mets 5-3 on Friday night.

news.title: 'Generally a safe mall': Two dead, three shot in Fairlane Town Center shooting in Dearborn
news.summary: Two people are dead after a shooting at Fairlane Town Center in Dearborn Friday afternoon.

news.title: Man killed in shooting served as mentor to teens in neighborhood
news.summary: Neighbors say the victim focused on helping kids and teens stay on the right path, LIVE on Channel 2 Action News at 4:00 p.m.

news.title: Man shot after arguing with, shooting at another man, police say
news.summary: ​Investigations determined that there was a verbal dispute between the two men, with the shooting victim, a convicted felon, labeled as the aggressor.

news.title: Stolen chairs won't ruin holiday spirit for Dunwoody parade regular
news.summary: A Dunwoody woman says her family had to purchase new lawn chairs after she says someone stole their original set from their viewing spot along Mount Vernon Road ahead of the annual Fourth of July para

news.title: Bell Mountain twins' deaths: Family now accepts GBI ruling
news.summary: The aunt of Qaadir and Naazir Lewis says the family now accepts the GBI's ruling after independent reviews.

news.title: Man charged in initial crash in I-45 chain of events that led to deputy’s death
news.summary: A 31-year-old man is accused of causing initial crash that set off multi-vehicle scene resulting in Montgomery County deputy being killed.

news.title: 'Armed and dangerous' suspect accused of shooting pregnant woman during argument arrested, police say
news.summary: Riverdale Police said the suspect was located in Atlanta.

news.title: Crime spree in Spalding County ends after shooting, 2 arrested
news.summary: Following a weekend crime spree led into gunfire, two young males were arrested in Griffin and now face felony charges.

news.title: Search underway for eagle statue stolen in north Georgia
news.summary: The statue stands approximately 7 feet tall, 2 feet wide and weighs between 150 and 200 pounds.

news.title: 2 women arrested for meth trafficking during Marietta traffic stop
news.summary: A Marietta traffic stop led to the seizure of about a half-pound of methamphetamine.

news.title: Woman allegedly planned to kill husband, burn home amid financial struggles, sheriff says
news.summary: A 58-year-old North Carolina woman has been charged with attempted first-degree murder after investigators say she admitted to attacking her husband while he slept because of alleged financial difficu

news.title: Missing person search leads to bodies in Webster County
news.summary: The Georgia Bureau of Investigation is investigating the deaths of two young men,19-year-old Zekevian James and 17-year-old Jo’Quavious Jones, following a missing persons search.

news.title: Who stole a 7-foot eagle? Georgia deputies want answers
news.summary: A 7-foot-tall eagle statue weighing up to 200 pounds was stolen from a Catoosa County property.
